The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Forsaken Reliquary

Reflections show altered selves.
Time undoes in agony.
Edge offers close yet distant escape.
Escape illusions lead to cosmic chorus.
Seeds destroy outward.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • Free a gun monkey is monkey gun gun he is.
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • Б.Г.Крайгородский сегодня не принимает!
